title: Awesome Evangelion AMV with song Guren no Yumiya
display_title: Awesome Evangelion AMV with song Guren no Yumiya
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS] Awesome Evangelion AMV with song Guren no Yumiya             Quote Post by TheDrmcvey » Sun May 12, 2013 5:06 pm THIS, needs more views! http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-t2fUVeYWwQ&feature=youtu.be&a

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Sun May 12, 2013 8:46 pm I gotta admit, that was pretty awesome. It had stuff from every film, it was well timed, the effects were excellent and it was teasery without explicitly spoiling anything. Not to mention the song was great. I just wish some parts weren't so blurry Also wish they had the actual Rebuild Japanese logo in there, instead of Shingeki no Kyojin's.

[]:             Quote Post by TheDrmcvey » Sun May 12, 2013 11:10 pm Shinoyami65 wrote: I gotta admit, that was pretty awesome. It had stuff from every film, it was well timed, the effects were excellent and it was teasery without explicitly spoiling anything. Not to mention the song was great. I just wish some parts weren't so blurry Also wish they had the actual Rebuild Japanese logo in there, instead of Shingeki no Kyojin's.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Mon May 13, 2013 1:02 am TheDrmcvey wrote: The guy who does these videos has a lot more like these, but unfortunately most of them were taken down by YouTube a few months ago. Hopefully he makes more videos like these in the future without copyright distractions.
